Description: Free confidential support for people in suicidal crisis or emotional distress. Call or text 988. Chat available online.
Free text-based crisis intervention with trained crisis counselors. Text HOME to 741741.
Confidential support for anyone affected by domestic violence. Advocates offer safety planning and resources.
Specialty: Domestic violence and intimate partner violence

Description: Free referral and information service for substance use and mental health disorders. Available in English and Spanish.
Specialty: Substance use and mental health referrals

Description: Crisis intervention and suicide prevention for LGBTQ+ young people under 25.
Confidential crisis support for veterans and their families. Responders are trained in veteran-specific issues.
Peer support hotline run by and for trans people. No nonconsensual active rescue policy.
Support for perinatal mood and anxiety disorders including postpartum depression.
Information and referral for people living with mental health conditions and their families. Not a crisis line.
Crisis counseling for people experiencing emotional distress related to natural or human-caused disasters.
Screening referrals and support for individuals struggling with eating disorders.
Crisis intervention and support for children and adults affected by child abuse.
Free confidential crisis counseling for NYC residents. Multilingual support. Mobile crisis teams available.
Walk-in and phone crisis stabilization unit for San Francisco residents. Connected to SFDPH behavioral health services.
Specialty: San Francisco Bay Area crisis stabilization

Description: Free emotional support line for Illinois residents experiencing stress and mental health challenges.
Behavioral health crisis line for Georgia residents. Connects callers with mobile crisis teams and facility-based services.
